scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd apps/web build
scripts.types:cf: bun run --cwd apps/web types:cf && bun run --cwd apps/worker-edge-guard types:cf && bun run --cwd apps/worker-post-events types:cf
scripts.types:cf:check: bun run --cwd apps/web types:cf:check && bun run --cwd apps/worker-edge-guard types:cf:check && bun run --cwd apps/worker-post-events types:cf:check
scripts.check: bun run types:cf:check && bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bunx tsc -p packages/auth-hasher-contracts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/auth-hasher-client/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/auth-hasher-better-auth-adapter/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/auth-hasher/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/auth-hasher-worker/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/worker-content/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/worker-meta/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/worker-edge-guard/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/worker-post-events/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun run --cwd apps/web check
scripts.check:ci: bun run check && bun run verify:openapi
scripts.gen:openapi: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun packages/api/scripts/gen-openapi.ts
scripts.verify:openapi: bun run gen:openapi && git diff --exit-code apps/web/static/openapi
